title: Spartan spear
description: This spear will give you hope to strike your enemy and give God of war vibe
body:
This spear is inspired by drapunir and Old kratos spear and THis spear will give you hope for killing your enemy and put down when its work is done 
![Asthetic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2775c572be3f9db5861f3c9df3ba3321c6f944.png)

Spear resource pack will only change in hand texture not the inventory it will only applied to nethrite spear
